category_2_star_note: Category 2** requires THREE years post-graduate experience for Specialty Title. For Qataris/family sponsored: TWO years.
category_3_note: Dentists with post-graduate degrees NOT in the approved list: Cannot be Specialist. Can apply as General Dentist + Prometric + non-core privileges.
